title: T-120 — UI: Brief detail page (brief_detail) — slice of T-034
prompt:
# T-120 — Brief detail page UI (slice of T-034)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §9.2 + UX brief_detail
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx:84-231 (brief_detail)
Parent root: T-034

## Goal
Server Component page `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/[id]/page.tsx` rendering `brief-detail-form.tsx` (Client) — RHF form with all PRD fields (Section A 13 fields + Section B 7 explicit fields + packaging_ext KeyValue list), save/submit actions wired to `saveBriefDraft` Server Action, plus a status timeline sidebar.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx:84-231`
- Two-section tabs (Product details / Packaging) → shadcn Tabs
- Converted brief read-only state → derive disabled prop from brief.status='converted'; show Alert variant='success' with link to project
- Multi-component table with inline editing → useFieldArray; weight total computed via watch()
- weightMismatch validation (totalWeight vs 220g target ±5g) → Zod .superRefine on components array; surface as array-level error → destructive Badge 'Weight mismatch'
- C14-C19 packaging fields with fa field mapping hints → shadcn FormDescription below each FormField
- C21-C37 placeholder fields → render as disabled Input with badge 'TBD'
- Mark complete CTA: per e2e-spine patch use 'Complete brief for project' copy and route to project detail (not FA Core)

## Implementation contract
New `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/[id]/page.tsx` (RSC) loads brief, renders `brief-detail-form.tsx` 'use client'. RHF + zodResolver(briefDetailSchema). Save = `saveBriefDraft`; Mark complete runs V-NPD-BRF-001 weight check server-side before status change and routes to the linked project. Status timeline sidebar shows status transitions. shadcn Tabs+Form+FormField+Input+Textarea+Select+Table+Button+Alert+Badge.

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/[id]/page.tsx [create]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/[id]/_components/brief-detail-form.tsx [create]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/[id]/_components/__tests__/brief-detail-form.test.tsx [create]`
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx [ref]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the brief detail renders, when compared to brief-screens.jsx:84-231 (brief_detail), then Section A has 13 fields and Section B has 7 explicit fields + packaging_ext rendered as KeyValue list, using shadcn Tabs+Form+FormField+Input — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction).
2. Given a user adds a component row whose summary weight delta exceeds tolerance, when rendered, then a destructive Badge 'Weight mismatch' is shown inline.
3. Given Mark complete is clicked on a complete brief, when the action succeeds, then the CTA copy reads 'Complete brief for project' and the user is routed to the linked Stage-Gate project (not FA Core).
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: 3 RTL tests covering: (a) Section A 13 + Section B 7 + packaging_ext KeyValue parity, (b) weight mismatch destructive Badge, (c) Mark complete CTA copy + project navigation.
- Run: `pnpm --filter web test brief-detail-form`.
- Capture screenshots/Playwright trace/artifacts in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement the list page here (T-119)
- Do not wire navigation glue here (T-121)
- Do not implement Brief Convert modal
- Do not bypass saveBriefDraft
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not route Mark complete directly to FA Core
